title: Your First Robot: Foundations of Robotics
subtitle: Start with zero. End with a robot that moves and thinks.
description: The 6 ideas every roboticist starts with — sensing, deciding, moving, debugging, and where to go next. Zero hardware needed. Built around the way real Indian students learn.
what_youll_learn: Explain what a robot is and what makes it different from a machine
Identify the three core systems of any robot (Sense, Think, Act)
Recognise how sensors, brains and motors fit together
Spot the failure mode behind any robot mishap
Tell which type of robot career path fits where you are
Read a real Atlas entry without getting lost
